name: Btg Pactual Esg Fundo De Indice S P Brazil Esg
summary: BTG Pactual ESG Fundo de Indice S&P Brazil ESG is an exchange-traded fund that seeks to replicate the performance of the S&P Brazil ESG Index. The fund invests in Brazilian companies that meet specific environmental, social, and governance criteria. The fund is managed by BTG Pactual and domiciled in Brazil.
